Lyrics.text:
1. Dera, Laza, Hery, Haja,
Ho an'Andriamanitra
Tompon'aina, Zanahary,
Rain'ny voninahitra,
Izy no mpanao antsika,
Sady ivelomana;
Fototr'aina, foto-tsoa,
Izy ivavahana.
Hihira isika hoe : Haleloia!
Dera ho an'Andriamanitra
:,:Dia Haleloia! Haleloia! :,:
2. Ray Tsitoha, tsy miova,
Tia sy mamindra fo,
Mahasoa isan'andro,
Izy no isaorana;
Vatolampy tsy mifindra,
Tokin'olombelona;
Fiarova-mahavonjy,
Izy itokiana
Hihira isika hoe : Haleloia!
Dera ho an'Andriamanitra
:,:Dia Haleloia! Haleloia! :,:
